posts.author: Julia.Palm.Omnitas (Julia Palm)
posts.cookedHtml:
Join Omnitas event, in partnership with monday.com and Make, for an exclusive, high-impact event right in the heart of London on March 5th!

Say goodbye to outdated workflows and disconnected platforms. This event is designed for decision-makers, team leaders, and innovators ready to embrace the transformative power of AI and automation to drive real business impact.

Mark Your Calendar!
When: 5th of March at 12:00 PM
Where: The Gallery, London, 140 Goswell Road, EC1V 7DY
SIGN UP HERE: The Future of Work Management – March 2026 – Omnitas Consulting

What to Expect:

  • Inspiration on how to harness practical AI for your everyday work
  • Real-world strategies you can apply immediately
  • A look into technologies that scale as you grow
  • Networking with leaders facing similar internal challenges
  • Inspiration from leaders who’ve already transformed their teams using automation

We hope to see you there!

posts.author: Julia.Palm.Omnitas (Julia Palm)
posts.cookedHtml: @Julietteb Hi! Could you please add this to the event calendar announcement?
